news.headline: China's snack food market to reach $206.20B by 2033, up from $131.10B in 2024. Urbanization, changing lifestyles driving demand for low-calorie snacks. Online platforms boost consumption.
news.summary: Dublin - A new report on the China snacks food market projects significant growth, with an anticipated market value of around US$206.20 Billion by 2033, a substantial increase from US$131.10 Billion in 2024. The report forecasts a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.16% from 2025 to 2033, highlighting the escalating trend in snack consumption in China. Contributing factors include urbanization, rising incomes, and shifting lifestyles. This growth trajectory signifies lucrative opportunities in the snacks food sector in China.

news.headline: Newegg plans a 20-to-1 share combination of common shares to be effective around April 7, 2025.
news.summary: In Diamond Bar, California, Newegg Commerce, Inc. (NASDAQ: NEGG), a prominent player in technology product e-commerce, disclosed that its board of directors sanctioned a 20-to-1 share consolidation (referred to as a reverse stock split) of its common shares. The Company's controlling shareholders also endorsed this decision through written consent. The consolidation is anticipated to come into effect on or about April 7, 2025.

news.headline: National CineMedia launches Bullseye, using AI for hyper-local ads; offers precision targeting for campaigns at scale.
news.summary: New York-based National CineMedia (NASDAQ: NCMI), the prominent cinema advertising platform in the US, has unveiled a new product called Bullseye. Bullseye is the latest addition to its NCMx™ suite and utilizes AI-generated content to provide dynamic, hyper-localized messaging on a large scale. This innovative offering incorporates crucial factors like designated market area, geo-targeting, local promotions, and audience analytics. Through Bullseye, advertisers can fine-tune their campaigns with accuracy across the NCM platform.

news.headline: Midwest sees rapid home price increases; Milwaukee leads with 20% rise to $330,000. Detroit follows at 12.5% rise.
news.summary: Seattle - Home prices in the Midwest are on the rise, with three of the top five metro areas experiencing the fastest growth, as per a recent report by Redfin. In Milwaukee, the median home sale price surged by a record 20% year over year in February to $330,000, leading among the 50 most populous metros. Following closely were Detroit with a 12.5% increase, Nassau County, NY at 11.7%, San Jose, CA at 11.1%, and Cleveland at 10%. Nationally, the median home price saw an overall increase.

news.headline: SWISSto12 CEO Emile de Rijk named Satellite Executive of the Year for 2024 by Via Satellite.
news.summary: In Washington, Dr. Emile de Rijk, the CEO of SWISSto12, has been honored with the 2024 Satellite Executive of the Year Award by Via Satellite.

news.headline: American Vanguard reports preliminary results for Q4 & full year 2024. Final results in 10-K. NYSE:AVD, crop protection company.
news.summary: American Vanguard® Corporation, traded on NYSE as AVD, based in Newport Beach, California, disclosed its preliminary financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2024. The company focuses on specialty and agricultural products for crop protection and nutrition, turf and ornamental management, and commercial pest control. The final results will be included in the 10-K filing for the fiscal year.

news.headline: Full Circle Lithium extends warrants, adjusts exercise price and term for 6,987,393 outstanding common shares.
news.summary: In Toronto on March 14, 2025, Full Circle Lithium Corp. (FCL), a manufacturer of lithium products based in the USA, disclosed its plan to adjust the exercise price and term details for 6,987,393 existing common share purchase. The company's stocks are listed on the TSX Venture Exchange (FCLI) and OTCQB market (FCLIF).

news.headline: Aadi Bioscience (Nasdaq: AADI) to discuss Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results and corporate updates on March 19, 2025.
news.summary: Today, in Morristown, New Jersey, on March 14, 2025, Aadi Bioscience, Inc. (Nasdaq: AADI) disclosed plans to conduct a webcast for a comprehensive review of their financial performance in the fourth quarter and full-year of 2024, along with recent corporate developments. The webcast is scheduled for Wednesday, March 19, 2025, where they will delve into these results.

news.headline: SDG&E approved expansion of Westside Canal Battery Energy Storage facility in Imperial Valley for grid resiliency.
news.summary: In San Diego on March 14, 2025, SDG&E revealed that CPUC has given the green light for the expansion of the Westside Canal Battery Energy Storage facility in Imperial Valley, California. The project aims to enhance the storage capacity of the facility and improve energy services for residents.

news.headline: Three independent schools in Frederick, MD, form Frederick Independent School Alliance to collaborate and engage community.
news.summary: In Frederick, Maryland, on March 14th, 2025, three separate schools have united to establish the Frederick Independent School Alliance (FISA). This alliance is focused on enhancing cooperation, exchanging resources, and advancing the collective interests of independent schools.

news.headline: Brunswick Main Street announces 2024 Façade & Interior Improvement Grant recipients, empowering businesses and property owners to enhance their spaces.
news.summary: In Brunswick, Maryland on March 14, 2025, Brunswick Main Street revealed the recipients of the 2024 Façade & Interior Improvement Grant. This program aids businesses and property owners in the Brunswick Main Street district in revitalizing their spaces.

news.headline: LG Electronics remains the top player in OLED TV market with over 52.4% share in 2024, marking 12th year of leadership.
news.summary: With a market share exceeding 52.4 percent in 2024, LG Electronics solidifies its top position in the premium TV sector, headquartered in Englewood Cliffs, N.J. LG's leadership in OLED TV shipments worldwide was reaffirmed, showcasing its unparalleled prowess in the industry.

news.headline: Seagram's Escapes introduces modern slim cans and new flavor with reduced sugar. Available now. Glow-up for popular brand!
news.summary: Introducing a Refreshed Appearance and Reduced Sugar in Certain Options—Now in Stores ROCHESTER, N.Y., 14th March 2025 – Prepare to enjoy your drink in a whole new way! Seagram's Escapes, known for its delightful fruity malt beverages, has undergone a significant transformation. Featuring a modern slim can design, some varieties now have lower sugar content...

news.headline: 15th annual T.D. Jakes' International Leadership Summit in Orlando focuses on cross-generational collaboration, changing the guard for leaders in a quickly changing world.
news.summary: The 15th annual Summit in Orlando, Florida on March 14, 2025, will center on the theme "Changing of the Guard" for business and spiritual leaders. In a rapidly evolving world, sectors such as technology, finance, politics, and communications are experiencing significant disruptions. This year's Summit aims to address these transformations, with a focus on the transition of leadership.

news.headline: DFIN appoints Ayman Sayed, CEO, to its Board of Directors, a leading provider of financial solutions (NYSE: DFIN).
news.summary: A Chief Executive Officer known for driving software growth is set to join the Board of Directors in a significant move by DFIN. The company, a top player in financial reporting and capital markets solutions, revealed the news on March 14, 2025. DFIN, listed on NYSE as DFIN, is making strides to enhance its leadership team with key appointments like this, underlining their commitment to strengthening their position in the market.

news.headline: Dr. Dana Ñkaña joins Auto Shop Answers for industry innovation, business growth. Announcement on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: Dr. Dana Ñkaña has recently joined the Auto Shop Answers Family of Businesses, a top provider of business solutions for automotive service centers. This move, announced on March 14, 2025, marks a significant step in enhancing their dedication to excellence and education. Based in Houston and Boston, Auto Shop Answers continues to solidify its position as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Acarix named 2025 Digital Innovation Winner by Global Cardiovascular Awards for AI and acoustics-based cardiac diagnostics.
news.summary: Acarix, a prominent company specializing in AI and acoustics-based cardiac diagnostics, has recently been honored with the prestigious 2025 Digital Innovation Award in Oklahoma City on March 14th, 2025. This award recognizes Acarix's exceptional work in pioneering digital, mobile, and AI technologies that are revolutionizing the landscape of cardiovascular care. Acarix's innovative contributions are reshaping the future of cardiac diagnostics with cutting-edge advancements.

news.headline: Adept Materials secured $4.6M funding for launch of advanced moisture control paint product.
news.summary: A startup company based in Somerville, Massachusetts, has successfully completed a seed funding round of $4.6 million as they gear up to introduce their inaugural product. Adept Materials, specializing in advanced materials, is on the brink of releasing a high-end interior paint and primer system to the market. This significant funding injection indicates investor confidence in the company's potential for growth and innovation as they venture into the consumer product sector.

news.headline: EQ GLOBAL's CEO plans to strengthen management and expand business to become a top semiconductor repair firm.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on March 14, 2025, it was announced by Stanley Choi that efforts will be focused on bolstering core management and increasing business size to lay the groundwork for EQ GLOBAL's advancement as a top global semiconductor equipment repair firm. This commitment underscores the company's determination to solidify its position in the market. The exact figures related to this expansion were not disclosed in the statement.

news.headline: Com2uS Platform chosen as AWS ISV Accelerate Partner for tech, sales, and marketing support. Seoul, March 14, 2025.
news.summary: South Korean company Com2uS Platform, headed by CEO Sogwon Choe, has recently been chosen to participate in Amazon Web Services' ISV Accelerate Program. This program offers extensive assistance in technology, sales, and marketing areas. The announcement was made on March 14, 2025, showcasing Com2uS Platform's entrance into the program.

news.headline: Tesla, facing tariff impact amid market drop, grapples with trade tensions as stocks decline significantly.
news.summary: The renowned electric vehicle company headed by Elon Musk is preparing for negative impacts due to trade conflicts, with stock prices dropping into correction territory.

news.headline: Bit Digital, Inc. reports $108.1M revenue in FY 2024, generating $58.6M from bitcoin mining, $45.7M from cloud services, and $1.4M from colocation services. Total liquidity stands at $260.7M with Shareholders' Equity at $463.5M, and Adjusted EBITDA at $73M. The company earned 949.9 bitcoins and 565.1 ETH in FY 2024.
news.summary: Bit Digital, Inc. reported financial results for Fiscal Year 2024, with total revenue reaching $108.1 million, a 141% increase from the previous year. Revenue from bitcoin mining was $58.6 million, cloud services revenue was $45.7 million, colocation services revenue was $1.4 million, and ETH staking revenue was $1.8 million. The company had $98.9 million in cash and total liquidity of $260.7 million as of December 31, 2024. Adjusted EBITDA for 2024 was $73.0 million. The company earned 949.9 bitcoins in 2024, paid about $0.05 per kilowatt-hour for electricity, and had an average fleet efficiency of 26.2 J/TH. Treasury holdings included 741.9 BTC and 27,623.2 ETH.

news.headline: Trump's trade threats led S&P 500 into correction, impacting wine and whiskey prices, altering budgets.
news.summary: On Thursday, the S&P 500 plunged into correction territory following President Trump's announcement of potential new tariffs. These tariffs would impact the budgets for wine and whiskey, causing significant concern among investors. The exact percentage of the drop in the S&P 500 was not provided, but it signifies a notable downturn. The looming threat of these tariffs has sparked unease in the market, adding to the volatility already present due to ongoing trade tensions.

news.headline: Bionano Genomics (Nasdaq: BNGO) to report Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 31, 2025, with a 4:30pm ET conference call.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Bionano Genomics, Inc. revealed plans to conduct a conference call and live webcast on March 31, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The purpose of the event is to disclose the financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024, along with showcasing recent advancements in the company's operations. The company's stock, listed under Nasdaq as BNGO, will be the focal point of discussions during this event.

news.headline: Primech AI to debut HYTRON AI-powered cleaning robot at RoboSG 2025, shows commitment to innovation.
news.summary: Today, in Singapore on March 14, 2025, Primech AI Pte. Ltd., a subsidiary of Primech Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: PMEC), disclosed its attendance at RoboSG 2025. During the event, the company will introduce HYTRON, an innovative AI-driven autonomous bathroom cleaning robot. This unveiling exemplifies Primech AI's dedication to revolutionizing facility services, marking a significant step forward for the company's technological advancements.

news.headline: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. in Shenzhen reveals innovative quantum key distribution protocol utilizing quantum Fourier transform and quantum-controlled NOT gate.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, in Shenzhen, China, MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLO), a tech service provider, unveiled a pioneering high-dimensional quantum key distribution protocol for quantum transmission. This proposal utilizes quantum Fourier transform to establish a secure coding framework for key distribution, employing quantum operations like quantum Fourier transform and quantum-controlled NOT gate for covert information sharing. This innovative direction in quantum technology marks a significant advancement in the field, revolutionizing secure communication methods.

news.headline: PROCEPT BioRobotics® to host investor event on April 25, 2025, at 2025 AUA Annual Meeting in Las Vegas. #PRCT #urology
news.summary: A surgical robotics company known as PROCEPT BioRobotics Corporation (Nasdaq: PRCT) disclosed their plans to hold an investor event on April 25, 2025, at the Venetian Hotel in Las Vegas. The event will coincide with the American Urological Association Annual Meeting and will take place from 8:00am to 9:30am Pacific Time. This event aims to showcase the company's innovative solutions in urology.

news.headline: 22nd Century Group (Nasdaq: XXII) to release 2024 results on March 20, 2025, webcast at 8 AM ET. Press release at 6 AM ET.
news.summary: In Mocksville, North Carolina, on March 14, 2025, 22nd Century Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: XXII), a tobacco products company advocating for reduced nicotine options for smokers, is set to conduct a webcast on March 20, 2025, at 8:00 AM ET. The purpose is to review its 2024 fourth quarter and full year financial results. These results will be officially announced via press release at 6:00 AM ET on the same day.

news.headline: Nuvectis Pharma CEO to speak at 37th Annual Roth Conference on Mar 17-19 in Dana Point, California - March 14, 2025.
news.summary: Fort Lee, New Jersey - On March 14, 2025, Nuvectis Pharma, Inc. revealed that Ron Bentsur, the Chairman and CEO, will be engaging in a fireside discussion at the 37th Annual Roth Conference from March 17th to 19th in Dana Point, California. The company, specialized in pioneering precision medications for critical unaddressed oncological illnesses, aims to present groundbreaking developments at the event.

news.headline: ORYZON to provide corporate updates at multiple global events in March-April 2025. #biopharma #epigenetics #medicalbio需
news.summary: Oryzon Genomics, S.A., a biopharmaceutical company based in Madrid, Spain and Cambridge, Massachusetts, disclosed on March 14, 2025, that it will be providing updates on its corporate advancements at various international gatherings scheduled in March and April. The company, identified by ISIN Code ES0167733015 and trading as ORY, focuses on utilizing epigenetics to create treatments for conditions with significant unmet medical requirements. The management of Oryzon Genomics will be sharing information on their progress at these upcoming events.

news.headline: Great Lakes reveals plan for $50M share buyback program.
Doman Building Materials Group Ltd. announces quarterly dividend in Canada, exclusive to United States.
news.summary: This press release is solely for distribution in Canada and is not meant for distribution to United States newswire services or dissemination in the United States.

news.headline: Athabasca Oil renews NCIB to buy 50,432,973 shares in 12 months period starting March 18, 2025; prior NCIB set to expire on March 17, 2025.
news.summary: Athabasca Oil Corporation, based in Calgary, Alberta, disclosed today that the Toronto Stock Exchange has given the green light for the renewal of the Company’s normal course issuer bid (NCIB). This allows Athabasca to buy back up to 50,432,973 common shares within the upcoming 12-month period starting on March 18, 2025, and ending on March 17, 2026, or potentially earlier if the NCIB is finalized or ceased by Athabasca. The existing NCIB is set to lapse on March 17, 2025.

news.headline: Worksport reveals a 1:10 reverse stock split to comply with Nasdaq regulations.
Bitcoin Depot appoints Chris Ryan as Chief Legal Officer to support expansion and industry progression.
news.summary: A leading Bitcoin ATM company has bolstered its executive team to facilitate growth and adapt to industry advancements. The company aims to fortify its C-Suite to oversee its expansion and navigate through the evolving cryptocurrency market. This strategic move comes as the company eyes a significant increase in the number of Bitcoin ATMs worldwide and seeks to capitalize on the growing interest in digital currencies. The strengthened leadership team will play a vital role in driving the company's ambitious plans for expansion and ensuring its success in the dynamic cryptocurrency landscape.

news.headline: Korro Bio's KRRO-110 receives FDA orphan drug designation for Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency. Nasdaq: KRRO. (Numbers not provided)
news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on March 14, 2025, Korro Bio, Inc. (Nasdaq: KRRO), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has sanctioned orphan drug designation for their experimental drug, KRRO-110. This medicine is aimed at addressing Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency (AATD), a condition affecting individuals with a scarcity of the Alpha-1 Antitrypsin protein. Korro specializes in developing genetic medicines that involve editing RNA. The orphan drug designation serves to acknowledge its potential to treat AATD, a disease impacting both rare and commonly seen cases.

news.headline: Uranium Corp. plans private placement worth up to C$1M.
news.summary: According to recent reports, there has been a significant increase in job openings across various industries, with the number of available positions rising by 15% compared to last year. The data shows that the current job market is robust, with over 6 million job openings nationwide. Additionally, job seekers are experiencing faster hiring processes, with companies filling positions in an average of 23 days. This trend indicates a positive outlook for individuals looking for employment opportunities.

news.headline: Hepsiburada announces fourth issuance of asset-backed securities totaling TRY 500 million on NASDAQ.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025 in Istanbul, a major Turkish e-commerce platform, D-MARKET Electronic Services & Trading, also known as Hepsiburada, revealed the launch of its fourth asset-backed securities worth TRY 500 million. The company operates under the ticker symbol HEPS on the NASDAQ.

news.headline: Aligos Therapeutics grants 4,000 stocks to a new hire, aiming to enhance therapies for liver and viral diseases.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Aligos Therapeutics, Inc. revealed that the Compensation Committee of the Company’s Board of Directors provided a non-qualified stock option for the acquisition of 4,000 shares of the Company’s stock to a new employee on March 11, 2025. Aligos Therapeutics, Inc. is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ALGS, specializing in creating top-tier treatments for liver and viral diseases to enhance patient outcomes.

news.headline: Announcing Annual General Meeting for North Media A/S with important details.
illumins Q4 revenue grew by 35% YoY to $49.9M; Full-year revenue increased by 11% YoY to $140.4M. Self-service revenue up 45% and 78%. Adjusted EBITDA improved by 42% and 104%.
news.summary: In the last quarter, revenue exhibited a notable growth of 35% year-over-year across all service lines, reaching $49.9 million. The full-year revenue also saw a substantial increase of 11% year-over-year, totaling $140.4 million. Self-service revenue showed remarkable growth rates of 45% year-over-year for the quarter and 78% for the full year. Additionally, there was a significant improvement in adjusted EBITDA, with a 42% year-over-year increase for the quarter and an impressive 104% growth for the full year.

BC.GAME launches promotions worth over $100,000 for 2025 IPL season, offers free bets and cash prizes.

With prizes exceeding $100,000, users during the tournament stand a chance to secure free bets and cash rewards.

news.headline: Kinetik plans $250M private placement for 6.625% sustainability-linked senior notes due 2028.
news.summary: Kinetik Holdings Inc. revealed plans for its subsidiary, Kinetik Holdings LP, to offer $250 million in total of 6.625% sustainability-linked senior notes due 2028, through an offering under Rule 144A and Regulation S. The Issuer aims to issue these New Notes subject to market conditions and other factors. The Offering will be conducted in accordance with the Securities Act of 1933, seeking to raise funds for investment in sustainable initiatives.

news.headline: US Commerce Secretary Lutnick: It would be fair to impose auto tariffs on cars from everywhere - Fox Business
Palantir's Warp Speed gains 6 new customers, bringing total adoption to 6. Key advancements in ERP data access.
news.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. revealed that six new customers, including Epirus, Red Cat, Saildrone, Saronic, Ursa Major, and SNC, have adopted Warp Speed. The company's shares (NASDAQ:PLTR) surged premarket following this news. Palantir's Warp Speed platform has introduced MRP Speed for ongoing network planning, enhancing material resource planning efficiency to prevent shortages and tackle disruptions swiftly. This technology allows rapid access to ERP data from over 10 systems within a day, reducing costs and time consumption significantly.
